componentDescription: Displays data in a structured table format with customizable content and appearance.

data.description: An array of data objects to be displayed in the table rows.

columns.description: An array of column definitions, specifying the title and data field for each column.

footer.description: An optional array of footer cell definitions to display at the bottom of the table.

caption.typeValues: Any valid React node (string, number, element, fragment, portal, boolean, null, undefined)
caption.description: An optional React node to be displayed as the table caption.

views.typeValues: { table?: ViewProps; thead?: ViewProps; tfoot?: ViewProps; tbody?: ViewProps; tr?: ViewProps; td?: ViewProps; th?: ViewProps; caption?: ViewProps; }
views.description: Optional custom styles for various table elements, overriding default styles.
views.defaultValue: DefaultTableStyles (applied implicitly if 'views' or specific properties within 'views' are not provided)

themeMode.typeValues: Varies (commonly 'light' | 'dark' or similar, depends on app-studio ViewProps)
themeMode.description: Specifies the theme mode for the component, such as 'light' or 'dark'.
themeMode.defaultValue: None (typically inherited or defaults to a global theme mode)
